items.title: [正面] Morimens is a gacha game with a card turn-based co...
items.summary:
Morimens is a gacha game with a card turn-based combat system. The art for each character is phenomenal (though there's few men). They've got it all; vampires, mommies, daddies, automatons, child soldiers.
The story is fun and (according to my experience) the game is pretty F2P friendly. I've unlocked 41 different characters in 84 hours without spending a single cent.

If you've got the tism you'll enjoy the combat system as there's a lot you can experiment with; all characters have their own unique command cards and ultimates (exalts) that range from simple to complex. every character is part of a realm (currently only 4 exist) each having their own quirk that impacts how you play the game.

If you like gambling, you'll like this game. If you like stratigizing, you'll like this game. If you like character design, you'll like this game. If you're just here for the plot, you'll like this game.

I've had a lot of fun playing this game so far and there's still a lot more for me to do and explore.
